arts.ttl: Old tweet from Liverpool stand-in boss emerges ahead of crucial Newcastle clash - with Reds coach set to step into the dugout after Arne Slot's ban
arts.sum: Heitinga will lead Liverpool for their clash against Newcastle on Wednesday after both Arne Slot and assistant Sipke Hulshoff were handed two-match touchline bans.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United summer transfer boost emerges just hours before Liverpool clash
arts.sum: Liverpool will seemingly face fresh competition from Newcastle United in the summer transfer window should tonight's opponents qualify for the Champions League.

arts.ttl: Late change for Liverpool vs Newcastle confirmed that could annoy Arne Slot
arts.sum: The latest Liverpool news as the Reds take on Newcastle United in the Premier League on Tuesday night as they look to increase their advantage at the top of the table.

arts.ttl: Johnny Heitinga's wealth admission, marriage to ex-Liverpool star's sister, Everton confession
arts.sum: Johnny Heitinga will take control of Liverpool against Newcastle on Wednesday evening as Arne Slot and Sipke Hulshoff serve their two-match suspensions

arts.ttl: Arne Slot and assistant receive suspensions following Merseyside Derby clash with officials
arts.sum: Following a heated Merseyside Derby exchange, Arne Slot and Sipke Hulshoff have been suspended for two games.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United must recover 'lost verve' to take advantage of Arne Slot Liverpool ban
arts.sum: Howe has warned that the Magpies can't afford another rough spell like the second half - in which two goals were conceded and Forest dominated - when Newcastle head to Anfield. Howe said: "We need every aspect of our game to be functioning as it was in the first half against Nottingham Forest, albeit we conceded the first goal, that apart I thought we responded really, really well.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot's honest six-word remark as Liverpool boss hit with huge FA fine and touchline ban
arts.sum: Liverpool boss Arne Slot has been handed a two-match touchline ban and a £70,000 fine after being sent off in the Merseyside derby against Everton earlier this month

arts.ttl: Mohamed Salah makes feelings clear on 'best' Liverpool season and points to two team-mates
arts.sum: Mohamed Salah's goals have left Liverpool on the verge of a first Premier League title in five years and the Egyptian superstar has compared this season to his best from the past

arts.ttl: Arne Slot's six-word admission as Liverpool boss handed touchline ban and huge FA fine
arts.sum: Arne Slot has been handed a two-game touchline ban in light of his post-match red card in Liverpool’s heated 2-2 draw against Everton earlier this month

arts.ttl: Newcastle United learn of 'elephant in room' at Premier League meeting
arts.sum: Before you even get into the 115 charges, Manchester City have launched a fresh legal challenge against the Premier League's amended associated party transactions (APT) rules and top-flight clubs had not yet been informed that the original regulations were found to be 'void and unenforceable' by a tribunal panel when stakeholders met earlier this month. Premier League clubs have decided to stick with the current PSR rules because of the 'uncertainty' surrounding Manchester City's legal fight.
